title: 💥 Attractor Merging & Collapse
name: Attractor Merging & Collapse
what_it_is: When two or more attractors interact—can merge into a new shape or collapse into a chaotic crash. Represents system destabilization.
how_to_use: two chaotic entities merge—attractor fields collapsing into a single luminous form
her aura flickers through attractor collapse—moments of harmony shatter into noise
animation_behavior: Attractors orbit, destabilize, snap into one form or explode into chaos
